textByHash.06dd771f6664ec8ae9c00b8956c58985c1bf006c: Hey, silly fishy wit da round head!
textByHash.5d40c7918521e6f7b5cfdcb45be2a8d20a6fa79a: Ya! What kinda fishy you's tinkin you are?
textByHash.f9ea0fffd56164922df0dcef6c99adfca5995cc7: Well what you doin' here if you's no a fishy?
textByHash.eb98c747a3bbb5cd081da3c49e0ef1015619e651: Dis fishy is a funny fishy!
textByHash.42181852737403783e590cc87c16cbf611589ca1: You's here to stealin' my big crunchy claws?
textByHash.dab0bbb6a915f8a576c6ff2c11cbfc6e875faf5f: Nung should smash your stoopid round head!
textByHash.f828a80e74d31480499f3bbd559880fe40977da0: Always the big nettings was taking my big crunchy claws, I put them in the cages, and now you's come to get them.
textByHash.5d2da1bc5a573870efb72d6dbd7c1002b2d43ba7: Swim away little fishy or I eat you till you's dead!
textByHash.a960831368687ce04f60bd137eda4fab9c64294b: Silly round head fishy want to swaps big crunchy claws?
textByHash.3f1238e3d4bee53b03bc940b85de32152d744e48: Naaah...you no real deal. I bet you no do Nung big favour.
textByHash.14b2ff50b59c08dd0c849b4a7871625ff3794066: Hah! Silly round head fishy! If you get Nung 5 big skippy skins, den maybe Nung thinking you ok.
textByHash.05b8a323d8adce38c23b2fcc440fb07b856064a5: Ya, da big skippies live over dere.
textByHash.56c42a18f0d05c40a18a2ccb88fa9a42e28148c2: You need lotsa big big stones to get down dere. Den you kill da big skippies and bring da skins to Nung.
textByHash.0bf83f69dd288da37cda66b40d5877facf8e8d7f: You do dis, den maybe Nung let you swaps da big crunchy claws.
textByHash.f25a26ff3c17d93708b9a960b09eb6088243efd4: Hey fishy! You gots da skippy skins?
textByHash.58c028d6003984842591768f704ab9ce382fe8ec: Den no crunchy claws for you!
textByHash.49862647f5f541fa1b2eb8da784052a0d231f8c1: What you say? Has da silly round headed fishy got da big skippy skins?
textByHash.141b1fbc3a07c5000b13158784e637cfee09bc4a: Silly round head fishy done good! Gimme!
textByHash.93788742d359bc22359c171e40b71e6a5caae05b: Ya, dis fishy is a good fishy, but it no count good like Nung! Nung say dere are dis many hides left for da fishy to get.
textByHash.c6009e5ad6a2eecc11b7ca0930c970ceb2ed92af: Go get me da hides little fishy!
textByHash.4865af6e5fe25ef90db7a5a5ad1a71a924901191: Ya, da round head fishy does a good big favour for Nung.
textByHash.cb3563a9c0573f47fc83e34a691e66adf1b2d56b: I am thinkin you's ok enough to swaps the giant crunchy claws now.
textByHash.8c17d38bdb7bda3fea1747a9753280f233afde94: You's gotta get me somefing to make dese hides to a cloak and flippers and hat, den I lets you have all the big crunchy claws you can get.
textByHash.28203fb5bf54d2e54300eee1721222657a58851f: Ya, it real dangerous for a fishy.
textByHash.4d94951d574624d3d2eccc05a7211c878143df36: You's gotta go up to da topsies, and your gotta get a needly-thing and some wirey stuff.
textByHash.f9454d79ee2492f54043a439e645ddcc365cc371: Ya, but be a sneaky round head fishy. Da topsies has not water for a little fishy like you to breathing.
textByHash.3dda8a8bfc5ae08b4bdbb4f1d6afc17c1c71440e: Has da fish brung Nung the wiry stuff and the needly thing?
textByHash.1f831ccc632cbf37df0ccd8822f743ad96cd2941: Nung not supprised, the upsies is real scaredy for da little fishies like you.
textByHash.fe083879acf8207d36b439ca2d1d0227774df6c6: Nung thinks this is a useful fishy he finds. Gimme!
textByHash.5533bd833b597b6c58bbc9a0488147b734314bc9: Nung have all da wiry stuff and needly things he needs to make da biggestest skippy skin hat ever!
textByHash.0e591214f147f420e72782e9410ad02556d52502: You's a good little fishy, you eat as many big crunchy claws as you want.
textByHash.15a58d763f963ea1e421ac156367974209ea1aa7: Maybe you get big and strong like Nung!
textByHash.dea16a346d8c734b10724f33e1a6f5ba47f3e314: Hey fishy. If you's a good fishy I might sell yous bitses of skippy skin clothes.
textByHash.ef87439c37f670bb320a654eaec510db17e069fe: But Nung needs time to makes them first.
